calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay Of Proceedings And To Relieve Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
BRIANNA K. PIERCE, ESQ., of BELLATRIX LAW, PC., Tel: 858-338-5650 for moving party.
No other appearances made in this matter.

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

PETITIONERS NARAYANAN RAJAGOPALAN, BAY VIEWS, LLC's Motion To Lift Stay Of Proceedings And To Relieve Counsel is Granted.

Before the court is an unopposed Motion to Lift Stay and to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel John S. Durrant. The Durrant Law Firm, APC, Brianna Pierce and Bellatrix Law, PC, counsel of record for Petitioners Narayanan Raja Gopalan and Bay Views, LLC.

On July 2, 2025, Moving Counsel had a substantially identical motion on calendar. The court issued a tentative ruling directing that a hearing was required. Moving Counsel failed to appear and, as a result. the motion was ordered off calendar. On August 21, 2025, Moving Counsel had a substantially identical motion on calendar. The court issued a tentative ruling directing that a hearing was required. This time, Counsel Pierce appeared, but late. The motion was denied because between the time the motion was filed and the hearing, the court had stayed the action at the parties' urging. Now, Moving Counsel take their third shot. In this motion, Moving Counsel failed to submit their motion to be relieved and supporting papers on the mandatory Judicial Council forms. (See MC051 & MC052.) Counsel should have filed two motions-one to lift the stay and one to be relieved as counsel with the latter on the mandatory JC forms. Given the need to move to lift the stay and the apparent lack of prejudice, the court will excuse this deficiency.

Orders are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Late Appearance in court By Brianna Pierce (Moving party). No other Appearance in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Bellatrix Law, P.C., Brianna K. Pierce Esq.'s Motion to be Relieved as counsel for Narayanan Rajagopalan and Bay Views LLC.

Bellatrix Law, P.C. and The Durrant Law Firm, APC's motion to be relieved as counsel is off calendar. Per order filed July 31, 2025 this case was stayed in its entirety.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Continued To Aug-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

BELLATRIX LAW, the Durrant Law Firm APC, Brianna K. Pierce's Motion to Be Relieved as counsel for PETITIONER NARAYANAN RAJAGOPALAN AN INDIVIDUAL, BAY VIEWS, LLC.

Continued to August 21, 2025, the date listed on the notice of motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Laura Riparbelli, Esq. of HOGE FENTON JONES & APPEL, INC. Tel: 408-947-2415 specially appearing for respondents.
No other appearances made in this matter.

A hearing was required; however, neither the moving party nor the petitioner appeared. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

PETITIONER NARAYANAN RAJAGOPALAN, BAY VIEWS, LLC's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is off calendar,

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
